files.notes: This file contains one article about Tennyson followed by the complete Guide Lessons for February section which includes 4 lessons (Theology, Work and Business, Literature on Mark Twain, and Social Service on Physical Problems of Childhood). The Guide Lessons section is a multi-lesson unit that should remain together as one file.
